open_observations: [SCOPE: architectural] Anti-circularity: test ASSERT generator-owned (tests/gen/**.g.cs, WriteAlways); ARRANGE human-seam (tests/src/**.Logic.cs, WriteIfAbsent). Executor NEVER writes assertions into seam, never moves ASSERT into seam.
[SCOPE: architectural] Determinism: all generator output OrderBy(StringComparer.Ordinal); never iterate Dictionary/HashSet into emitted output; topo-sort needs ordinal tie-break.
[SCOPE: architectural] Access authority: write-set/effect source = manifest.access {reads,creates,updates,deletes} (4-key, OperationJson.Access); NEVER operations.json/ContractAccess {reads,writes}.

[SCOPE: process] Locked decisions: Q1 xUnit project; Q2 conformance & process-tests independent (all 23, no dedupe); Q3 field-level ASSERT from effects (ContractEffect.Expr/Text); Q4 Go later (DotnetEmitter only); Q5 ambiguous/missing prereq -> DUR-marker Unsupported, never auto-pick creator.

[SCOPE: environmental] BUILD COMMANDS: whole solution = `dotnet build Gen.slnx` (root). `dotnet build src` ERRORS MSB1003 (no solution under src/). Gen.Core only = `dotnet build src/Gen.Core/Gen.Core.csproj`. Throwaway .NET file-based runners need `#:property JsonSerializerIsReflectionEnabledByDefault=true` (Gen.Core disables reflection JSON by default); delete runner+bin/obj after.

[SCOPE: code-convention; lives-with: Contract.cs] Additive record params MUST be optional (`= null`) so positional callers (e.g. tests/Gen.Tests/JoinTests.cs) keep compiling. T-1.1-fix applied this to ContractFile.Processes/Flows.

[SCOPE: environmental] ExprNodeConverter IS registered in src/Gen.Core/Json.cs (Loader uses Json.Options) -> ContractEffect.Expr deserializes as ExprNode (e.g. calculate 'iptal' -> LiteralNode). T-2.2 can render via ExprBuild.

T-1.1.note: T-1.1-fix added = null defaults to ContractFile.Processes/Flows (positional caller regression)
